content: Owlready2 (latest 0.51, released 2026-06-22) is a Python 3 ontology-oriented-programming module. It bundles HermiT and Pellet as Java JARs and calls them via subprocess (sync_reasoner / sync_reasoner_pellet), writing the ontology to a temp N-Triples file and parsing reasoner stdout for inferred facts. A JVM (JRE) is still required on the host/container even though the JARs ship inside the pip package; under Linux it auto-detects java, on Windows the interpreter path may need configuring.
